event_types.name: Significant Events (SEAs)
event_types.examples_raw: Missed diagnosis, delayed referral, unexpected death
event_types.typical_actions_raw: Full SEA analysis, team discussion, action plan

event_types.name: Near Misses
event_types.typical_actions_raw: Document, assess system factors, implement prevention

event_types.name: Medication Errors
event_types.typical_actions_raw: Patient notification, pharmacy liaison, system review

event_types.name: Test Results Not Actioned
event_types.typical_actions_raw: Contact patient, clinical review, workflow audit

event_types.name: Referral Delays
event_types.typical_actions_raw: Chase referral, document timeline, escalate

event_types.name: Patient Identification Error
event_types.examples_raw: Wrong patient notes, misidentification at check-in, prescription for wrong patient
event_types.typical_actions_raw: Immediate correction, root cause analysis, ID verification review

event_types.name: Clinical Communication Failures
event_types.examples_raw: Hospital discharge not received, results lost, handover gap between sessions
event_types.typical_actions_raw: Source documents, update records, process review

event_types.name: Clinical Handover Failure
event_types.examples_raw: Shift/session handover gap, urgent task not passed on, on-call handover missed
event_types.typical_actions_raw: Review handover process, implement structured handover tool, staff briefing

event_types.name: Prescription Errors
event_types.typical_actions_raw: Patient contact, pharmacy alert, system safeguards

event_types.name: Consent Issue
event_types.examples_raw: Consent not obtained, wrong consent, patient not informed of risks
event_types.typical_actions_raw: Patient contact, documentation review, consent process audit

event_types.name: Physical Violence
event_types.typical_actions_raw: Police report, staff support, risk assessment

event_types.name: Verbal Abuse/Threats
event_types.typical_actions_raw: Incident form, warning letter, consider removal

event_types.name: Threatening Behaviour
event_types.typical_actions_raw: Police, staff safety measures, premises security

event_types.name: Intruder/Trespass
event_types.typical_actions_raw: Security review, CCTV check, police if needed

event_types.name: Theft
event_types.typical_actions_raw: Police report, stock check, security review

event_types.name: Property Damage
event_types.typical_actions_raw: Repair, insurance claim, perpetrator action

event_types.name: Lone Working Incident
event_types.examples_raw: Staff working alone faces risk, no buddy system in place, out-of-hours lone worker concern
event_types.typical_actions_raw: Risk assessment review, lone working policy update, staff support

event_types.name: Patient Removal from List
event_types.typical_actions_raw: Document behaviour history, notify patient, arrange alternative registration, NHS England notification

event_types.name: Sexual Misconduct
event_types.examples_raw: Sexual harassment of staff or patient, unwanted sexual contact, indecent exposure, sexual comments, abuse of clinical relationship, voyeurism
event_types.typical_actions_raw: Ensure immediate safety, support complainant, investigate per Sexual Safety Policy, consider police referral, regulatory body notification, FTSU route
examples: Sexual harassment of staff or patient

event_types.name: Safety Concern Feedback
event_types.examples_raw: Patient reports feeling unsafe, medication concern raised, hygiene complaint
event_types.typical_actions_raw: Investigate safety issue, patient contact, clinical review, log as CQC Safe domain

event_types.name: Effectiveness Concern Feedback
event_types.examples_raw: Diagnosis query, treatment outcome concern, referral not working, doctor didn't examine me
event_types.typical_actions_raw: Clinical review, patient contact, outcome assessment, log as CQC Effective domain

event_types.name: Caring Concern Feedback
event_types.examples_raw: Felt rushed, not listened to, dignity issue, rude interaction, lack of compassion
event_types.typical_actions_raw: Staff discussion, patient follow-up, reflection, log as CQC Caring domain

event_types.name: Responsiveness Concern Feedback
event_types.examples_raw: Can't get appointment, long wait, phone not answered, online booking issues
event_types.typical_actions_raw: Access review, capacity assessment, process improvement, log as CQC Responsive domain

event_types.name: Leadership/Service Concern Feedback
event_types.examples_raw: Reception process complaint, communication breakdown, practice isn't organised
event_types.typical_actions_raw: Management review, process audit, staff training, log as CQC Well-led domain

event_types.name: Formal Complaint (NHS Process)
event_types.typical_actions_raw: Acknowledge within 3 days, investigate, respond within deadline

event_types.name: Compliment / Positive Feedback
event_types.examples_raw: Positive FFT response, thank you card, online review praise
event_types.typical_actions_raw: Log, share with team, include in governance reports

event_types.name: Online Review Concern
event_types.examples_raw: Negative NHS Choices review, Google review flagging issue
event_types.typical_actions_raw: Assess content, respond publicly if appropriate, internal investigation, learning

event_types.name: Learning Event / SEA Meeting Outcome
event_types.examples_raw: SEA discussion outcome, learning points agreed, quality improvement action
event_types.typical_actions_raw: Document learning, assign actions, set review date, share with team

event_types.name: Claims/Litigation
event_types.typical_actions_raw: MDU/MPS notification, preserve records

event_types.name: Coroner Inquests
event_types.typical_actions_raw: Legal review, statement preparation, attendance

event_types.name: Duty of Candour
event_types.typical_actions_raw: Patient notification, apology, investigation

event_types.name: CQC Concerns
event_types.typical_actions_raw: Action plan, evidence gathering, improvement work

event_types.name: Ombudsman Cases
event_types.typical_actions_raw: Full cooperation, learning implementation

event_types.name: Physical Accessibility Barrier
event_types.examples_raw: Broken wheelchair ramp/bell, lift out of order, treatment room inaccessible, no step-free access
event_types.typical_actions_raw: Immediate repair, temporary alternative, risk assessment, Equality Act review

event_types.name: Reasonable Adjustment Failure
event_types.examples_raw: Adjustment not recorded/actioned, patient unable to access service due to disability, sensory needs not met
event_types.typical_actions_raw: Patient contact, record update, staff training, process review
examples: patient unable to access service due to disability

event_types.name: Communication Needs Not Met
event_types.examples_raw: AIS not followed, no easy-read materials, hearing loop not working, BSL not arranged
event_types.typical_actions_raw: AIS compliance check, adjust patient record flags, staff briefing, source materials

event_types.name: Language Barrier
event_types.examples_raw: Interpreter not booked despite known need, telephone interpretation failed, patient left without understanding
event_types.typical_actions_raw: Rebook with interpreter, incident review, DALS service check, record language preference
examples: Interpreter not booked despite known need

event_types.name: Digital Exclusion
event_types.examples_raw: Patient unable to use online services, no alternative offered, e-consult only with no phone option
event_types.typical_actions_raw: Ensure non-digital pathway, patient support, process review
examples: Patient unable to use online services
e-consult only with no phone option

event_types.name: Discrimination Concern
event_types.examples_raw: Patient or staff reports discriminatory behaviour based on protected characteristic
event_types.typical_actions_raw: Investigation, support for affected person, HR/clinical lead involvement, training
examples: Patient or staff reports discriminatory behaviour based on protected characteristic

event_types.name: Appointment Access Barrier
event_types.examples_raw: Unable to get appointment within clinical need, DNA due to access issue, carer not accommodated
event_types.typical_actions_raw: Capacity review, pathway adjustment, patient follow-up
examples: Unable to get appointment within clinical need

event_types.name: Health Inequality Identified
event_types.examples_raw: Screening uptake gap in demographic group, outcomes disparity noted, outreach needed
event_types.typical_actions_raw: Population health review, targeted intervention, PCN liaison
examples: Screening uptake gap in demographic group

event_types.name: MHRA Alerts
event_types.typical_actions_raw: Patient search, recalls, clinical review

event_types.name: CAS Alerts
event_types.typical_actions_raw: Assess relevance, implement actions, confirm

event_types.name: NICE Guidance
event_types.typical_actions_raw: Review practice, update protocols, training

event_types.name: Public Health Alerts
event_types.typical_actions_raw: Patient identification, outbreak response

event_types.name: NHS England Comms
event_types.typical_actions_raw: Implementation planning, compliance

event_types.name: ICB/ICS Directives
event_types.typical_actions_raw: Service changes, pathway updates

event_types.name: BNF Updates
event_types.typical_actions_raw: Prescribing review, system updates

event_types.name: GMC/NMC Guidance
event_types.typical_actions_raw: Staff briefing, policy updates

event_types.name: Coroner Regulation 28 (Prevention of Future Deaths)
event_types.examples_raw: Report directed to practice requiring action to prevent future deaths
event_types.typical_actions_raw: Formal response, action plan, evidence of changes, deadline compliance
examples: Report directed to practice requiring action to prevent future deaths

event_types.name: Phone System Outage
event_types.typical_actions_raw: Backup procedures, provider escalation, patient comms

event_types.name: Clinical System Downtime
event_types.typical_actions_raw: Business continuity, paper backup, catch-up process

event_types.name: Internet Outage
event_types.typical_actions_raw: Mobile backup, prioritize urgent work

event_types.name: Medical Equipment Failure
event_types.typical_actions_raw: Repair/replace, calibration, patient rescheduling

event_types.name: Vaccine Fridge Breach
event_types.typical_actions_raw: Stock assessment, PHE guidance, wastage recording

event_types.name: Security System Failure
event_types.typical_actions_raw: Temporary measures, urgent repair

event_types.name: Panic Button / Duress Alarm Failure
event_types.examples_raw: Panic button not working in consulting room, duress alarm battery dead
event_types.typical_actions_raw: Immediate repair, temporary alternative, risk assessment, restrict room use
examples: Panic button not working in consulting room

event_types.name: Emergency Equipment Failure
event_types.examples_raw: Defibrillator fault, oxygen cylinder empty, anaphylaxis kit expired
event_types.typical_actions_raw: Immediate replacement, equipment check schedule review, staff notification

event_types.name: Premises Access Failure
event_types.examples_raw: Locked out of building, key safe failure, alarm preventing entry
event_types.typical_actions_raw: Emergency locksmith, backup key holders, alarm company contact

event_types.name: Secondary Care Disruption
event_types.examples_raw: Hospital clinic closures, pathway changes, referral pathway suspended/moved
event_types.typical_actions_raw: Update referral processes, alternative pathways, urgent case escalation, patient communication

event_types.name: Lab Service Disruption
event_types.typical_actions_raw: Alternative arrangements, prioritize urgent tests

event_types.name: Pharmacy Issues
event_types.typical_actions_raw: Alternative suppliers, patient communication

event_types.name: Interpreter Service Failure
event_types.typical_actions_raw: Reschedule, family interpreter (with consent), phone service

event_types.name: Transport/Courier Issues
event_types.typical_actions_raw: Alternative arrangements, urgent sample handling

event_types.name: 111/999 Overload
event_types.typical_actions_raw: Direct patient guidance, safety netting

event_types.name: Community Service Gaps
event_types.typical_actions_raw: Escalation, interim practice support

event_types.name: Mental Health Service Unavailability
event_types.examples_raw: CMHT unavailable, crisis team delays, IAPT waiting list excessive
event_types.typical_actions_raw: Direct escalation, safety planning, A&E if needed

event_types.name: Social Care Delays
event_types.typical_actions_raw: Escalation, interim support, documentation

event_types.name: Notifiable Disease
event_types.typical_actions_raw: PHE notification, contact tracing, outbreak team

event_types.name: Practice Outbreak
event_types.typical_actions_raw: Infection control measures, staff testing, deep clean

event_types.name: Needlestick Injury
event_types.typical_actions_raw: Occupational health, PEP assessment, source testing

event_types.name: Contamination Incident
event_types.typical_actions_raw: Immediate clean, exposure assessment

event_types.name: PPE Stock Issues
event_types.typical_actions_raw: Emergency procurement, conservation measures

event_types.name: Sterilization Failure
event_types.typical_actions_raw: Equipment quarantine, reprocessing, maintenance

event_types.name: IPC Audit Non-Compliance
event_types.examples_raw: IPC audit identifies failing, cleaning standards below threshold
event_types.typical_actions_raw: Action plan for deficiency, re-audit date, IPC lead review, staff training

event_types.name: Clinical Waste Incident
event_types.examples_raw: Improper disposal, missed collection, clinical waste overflow
event_types.typical_actions_raw: Correct disposal, contractor contact, storage review, staff briefing

event_types.name: Hand Hygiene Non-Compliance
event_types.examples_raw: Staff not following hand hygiene protocol, hand sanitiser dispensers empty
event_types.typical_actions_raw: Staff reminder, restock supplies, audit hand hygiene compliance, training
examples: Staff not following hand hygiene protocol

event_types.name: Drug Shortage
event_types.typical_actions_raw: Alternative prescribing, patient notification

event_types.name: Drug Recall
event_types.typical_actions_raw: Patient identification, replacement supply

event_types.name: Controlled Drug Discrepancy
event_types.typical_actions_raw: Investigation, police if theft suspected

event_types.name: Prescription Fraud
event_types.typical_actions_raw: Police, pharmacy alert, patient review

event_types.name: Formulary Change
event_types.typical_actions_raw: Prescribing switches, patient reviews

event_types.name: New Drug Interaction
event_types.typical_actions_raw: Patient search, prescription review

event_types.name: High-Risk Medication Review Overdue
event_types.examples_raw: Lithium monitoring lapsed, methotrexate bloods overdue, warfarin INR not checked
event_types.typical_actions_raw: Urgent patient contact, arrange monitoring, clinical review, system alert setup

event_types.name: Repeat Prescribing Error
event_types.examples_raw: Repeat authorised without review, stopped medication still issuing, dosage drift over repeats
event_types.typical_actions_raw: Prescription correction, patient contact, repeat authorisation audit, system review

event_types.name: Staff Injury at Work
event_types.typical_actions_raw: First aid, RIDDOR if needed, risk assessment

event_types.name: Sickness Patterns
event_types.typical_actions_raw: Support, occupational health, workload review

event_types.name: Training Non-Compliance
event_types.typical_actions_raw: Schedule training, restrict duties if needed

event_types.name: Registration Lapse
event_types.typical_actions_raw: Urgent revalidation, restrict practice

event_types.name: DBS Expiry
event_types.typical_actions_raw: Renewal application, chaperone restrictions

event_types.name: Professional Conduct
event_types.typical_actions_raw: Support, supervision, formal processes

event_types.name: Whistleblowing
event_types.typical_actions_raw: Protected disclosure process, investigation

event_types.name: Staffing Shortage / Unsafe Staffing
event_types.examples_raw: Staffing falls below safe minimum, no GP available for urgent slots, single-handed working
event_types.typical_actions_raw: Locum arrangement, session reduction, risk assessment, escalation
examples: no GP available for urgent slots

event_types.name: Staff Wellbeing Concern
event_types.examples_raw: Burnout identified, stress-related concern, team morale issue
event_types.typical_actions_raw: Wellbeing support, workload review, occupational health, FTSUG

event_types.name: Induction Failure
event_types.examples_raw: New starter not properly inducted, locum unfamiliar with systems/protocols
event_types.typical_actions_raw: Immediate induction catch-up, supervision, checklist review

event_types.name: Chaperone Unavailability
event_types.examples_raw: No trained chaperone available for intimate examination
event_types.typical_actions_raw: Reschedule examination, arrange alternative chaperone, review chaperone rota
examples: No trained chaperone available for intimate examination

event_types.name: Data Breach
event_types.examples_raw: Records sent to wrong person, lost laptop
event_types.typical_actions_raw: ICO assessment, patient notification, mitigation

event_types.name: Cyber Incident
event_types.typical_actions_raw: IT security response, reporting, recovery

event_types.name: Subject Access Request
event_types.typical_actions_raw: 30-day response, redaction review

event_types.name: FOI Request
event_types.typical_actions_raw: 20-day response, exemption review

event_types.name: System Access Issue
event_types.typical_actions_raw: Access review, disciplinary if needed

event_types.name: Record Keeping Failures
event_types.typical_actions_raw: Training, audit, template improvements

event_types.name: Confidentiality Breach (Verbal)
event_types.examples_raw: Overheard conversation, patient information discussed in public area, screen visible to others
event_types.typical_actions_raw: Staff reminder, environment review, screen positioning, privacy audit
examples: patient information discussed in public area

event_types.name: Consent to Share Failure
event_types.examples_raw: Information shared without consent, not shared when it should have been
event_types.typical_actions_raw: Consent review, patient notification, process correction, IG lead review
examples: not shared when it should have been

event_types.name: DSPT Non-Compliance
event_types.examples_raw: Data Security & Protection Toolkit item failing, evidence gap
event_types.typical_actions_raw: Action plan, evidence gathering, IG lead escalation, deadline tracking
examples: Data Security & Protection Toolkit item failing

event_types.name: Child Protection Concern
event_types.typical_actions_raw: MASH referral, documentation, liaison

event_types.name: Adult Safeguarding
event_types.typical_actions_raw: Social services referral, capacity assessment

event_types.name: Domestic Violence / Abuse
event_types.examples_raw: Disclosure or suspicion, patient discloses abuse
event_types.typical_actions_raw: Safety planning, MARAC referral if high risk, safeguarding referral, documentation

event_types.name: FGM Concern
event_types.typical_actions_raw: Mandatory reporting, safeguarding referral

event_types.name: Prevent Concern
event_types.typical_actions_raw: Prevent referral, documentation

event_types.name: Modern Slavery
event_types.typical_actions_raw: Police/safeguarding, NRM referral

event_types.name: Safeguarding DNA
event_types.examples_raw: Child or vulnerable adult DNAs appointment, repeated non-attendance
event_types.typical_actions_raw: Follow DNA protocol, assess risk, contact patient/carer, consider safeguarding referral
examples: Child or vulnerable adult DNAs appointment

event_types.name: Looked After Children (LAC) Concern
event_types.examples_raw: Health assessment delays, placement issues, missed reviews
event_types.typical_actions_raw: Liaise with social worker, arrange assessment, update care plan

event_types.name: Mental Capacity Concern
event_types.examples_raw: Patient lacks capacity for decision, IMCA needed, best interests decision required
event_types.typical_actions_raw: Capacity assessment, best interests meeting, IMCA referral, documentation

event_types.name: Self-Harm / Suicide Risk
event_types.examples_raw: Patient presents with self-harm, suicidal ideation disclosed, crisis presentation
event_types.typical_actions_raw: Immediate safety assessment, crisis team referral, safety plan, follow-up arrangement

event_types.name: MARAC Referral
event_types.examples_raw: High-risk domestic abuse case requiring multi-agency response
event_types.typical_actions_raw: Complete DASH-RIC, submit MARAC referral, attend conference, implement actions
examples: High-risk domestic abuse case requiring multi-agency response

event_types.name: Fire Alarm Activation
event_types.typical_actions_raw: Investigation, reset, fire service if needed

event_types.name: Building Issues
event_types.examples_raw: Heating failure, water leak, power cut
event_types.typical_actions_raw: Emergency repairs, patient safety, session relocation

event_types.name: Hazardous Spill
event_types.typical_actions_raw: Spill kit, area isolation, disposal

event_types.name: Legionella Risk
event_types.typical_actions_raw: Testing, flushing regime, remediation

event_types.name: Asbestos Disturbance
event_types.typical_actions_raw: Specialist assessment, area closure

event_types.name: Pest Infestation
event_types.typical_actions_raw: Pest control, stock check, deep clean

event_types.name: Slip/Trip Hazard
event_types.examples_raw: Wet floor, loose carpet, obstructed corridor
event_types.typical_actions_raw: Immediate hazard removal, warning signage, repair, risk assessment update

event_types.name: Temperature Non-Compliance
event_types.examples_raw: Room too hot/cold for clinical use, waiting area uncomfortable
event_types.typical_actions_raw: HVAC check, temporary measures, session relocation if needed
examples: Room too hot/cold for clinical use

event_types.name: Cleaning Standards Failure
event_types.examples_raw: Cleaner did not attend, standards below acceptable, clinical areas not cleaned
event_types.typical_actions_raw: Contractor contact, interim clean, IPC lead review, contract review

event_types.name: Waste Disposal Issue
event_types.examples_raw: Confidential waste collection missed, clinical waste overflow, incorrect segregation
event_types.typical_actions_raw: Contractor contact, secure storage, correct segregation, staff reminder

event_types.name: Signage / Wayfinding Issue
event_types.examples_raw: Missing fire exit signs, no accessible signage, out-of-date information displayed
event_types.typical_actions_raw: Replace signage, accessibility review, fire safety check

event_types.name: Building Maintenance Overdue
event_types.examples_raw: PAT testing overdue, fire extinguisher service lapsed, gas safety expired
event_types.typical_actions_raw: Schedule urgent maintenance, risk assessment, contractor booking, compliance log update

priority_matrix.examples: Violence, data breach, system down, safeguarding, accessibility barrier preventing care
SEA, formal complaint, drug shortage, service disruption, discrimination concern
Near miss, training lapse, minor equipment failure, online review concern, IPC audit gap
Compliment logging, minor process issues, health inequality noted for review, maintenance scheduling
